sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka theih ngei loh lungnopna ke’n ngah khin zo ta’ng,
Topa tung pum leh kha ka kipiak khit nungsang,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Lamdang ka Topa, Lamdang ka Topa
Vantung misiangte’n phat in bia hi,
Vanglian ka Honpa, kei aa Na hi ta,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: nuntakna khempeuh uk ding in kong deih hi,
Tua hileh kicing ding Na deihna; Na thu neihna bek
Na deih na kimsak hi, Lamdang a lamdang ka Topa.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka siamna khempeuh Na khe phungah
Nong san bang bang kei thaman hi pah;
Ka neih sate khempeuh Nang tungah kong pia

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Leitung a a hoih pen sangin Na hoihzaw
Tawntung-a ka Pasian phat ding Na kilawm hi,
